message:
test(tx): activate and align tx correctness and scenario-matrix suites

Switch both suites from the dead __journal_types_placeholder feature
gate to subprocess-bridge so they run in CI. Update helpers and
assertions for evolved plan.rs API: usize ordinals, string-based
failure_boundary, serde_json::Value receipts, and corrected outcome
mappings (PartialFailure->Failed, NothingToCompensate->Compensated).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
